actions.expression:
SELECT buyercodeapply.sid,
       buyercodeapply.wfgs,
       buyercodeapply.countryCode1,
       buyercodeapply.engName1,
       buyercodeapply.engAddress1,
       buyercodeapply.chnName1,
       buyercodeapply.chnAddress1,
       buyercodeapply.tel1,
       buyercodeapply.fax1,
       buyercodeapply.ywbm,
       buyercodeapply.ywry,
       buyercodeapply.jhfs,
       buyercodeapply.rzyh,
       buyercodeapply.rzsx,
       buyercodeapply.regNo1,
       buyercodeapply.glbz,
       buyercodeapply.mflxr,
       buyercodeapply.eMail
FROM buyercodeapply 
WHERE (buyercodeapply.buyerNo1=:buyerNo) 
  AND permission('') 
ORDER BY buyercodeapply.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT kh.sid,
       kh.company_name,
       kh.phone,
       kh.fax,
       kh.address,
       kh.country
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.kh_id=:kh_id) 
ORDER BY kh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT jhfs.jhfs,jhfs.SID
FROM jhfs
ORDER BY jhfs.SID ASC

SELECT yhzl.zwmc,yhzl.SID
FROM yhzl
ORDER BY yhzl.SID ASC

SELECT fkkh.xbdm,fkkh.khmc,fkkh.SID
FROM fkkh where (fkkh.xbdm<>"") and (fkkh.xbdm is not null)
ORDER BY fkkh.SID ASC

SELECT kh.kh_id
FROM kh
ORDER BY kh.kh_id ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT xbzxsheet.mc,xbzxsheet.dm
FROM xbzxsheet
WHERE   (xbzxsheet.ssmk="贸易术语")
ORDER BY xbzxsheet.mc ASC

SELECT xbzxsheet.SID,xbzxsheet.dm,xbzxsheet.sss1
,xbzxsheet.sss
FROM xbzx,xbzxsheet
WHERE   (xbzx.SID=xbzxsheet.PID)
   AND  (xbzxsheet.ssmk="注册区域")
ORDER BY xbzxsheet.SID ASC
